all_candidates.topic: Should consumers be mandated to use E20 petrol?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas stated on July 10, 2026, that E20 petrol is currently costlier to produce than pure petrol, and ruled out offering pure petrol or lower blends as options.

all_candidates.topic: Are AI-driven layoffs acceptable for corporate productivity?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Reports on July 9, 2026, indicate that around 35,000 tech jobs may be eliminated this year in India's IT sector due to AI-driven restructuring.

all_candidates.topic: Should banks be liable for all financial product mis-selling?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The RBI introduced a new rule effective July 1, 2026, to protect customers from mis-selling financial products, allowing claims for refunds and compensation.

all_candidates.topic: Should urban planning prioritize monsoon disaster resilience?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Monsoon fury on July 11, 2026, caused landslides in Uttarakhand, Himachal, and J&K, leading to rain-related deaths.

all_candidates.topic: Do new RBI rules sufficiently protect against online fraud?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) introduced new rules effective July 1, 2026, proposing enhanced safeguards for customers affected by digital banking fraud.

all_candidates.topic: Has ethanol blending truly stabilised India's fuel prices?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Petroleum and Natural Gas Minister Hardeep Singh Puri stated on July 10, 2026, that ethanol blending helped India keep petrol prices among the world's lowest.

all_candidates.topic: Is re-conducting NEET exams effective for fairness?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The National Testing Agency (NTA) released the Answer Key for the NEET (UG) – 2026 re-examination on July 7, 2026, which was held on June 21, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Does AI adoption justify strategic job role changes?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Microsoft announced on July 7, 2026, global layoffs of 4,800 jobs, with India expected to face a 'minimal numerical' but 'massive strategic' impact due to AI investments.

all_candidates.topic: Should only EVs be registered in Delhi from next year?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The Delhi Electric Vehicles (EV) Policy 2026, effective from July 1, 2026, mandates only electric three-wheelers and N1 goods carriers for new registrations from January 1, 2027.

all_candidates.topic: Is increasing passport application fees justified?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Passport application fees in India increased from July 1, 2026, for both normal and Tatkaal categories.

all_candidates.topic: Are recent credit card benefit changes fair to consumers?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Credit card companies and banks revised reward programs and airport lounge access benefits, effective July 1, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Should platforms proactively remove all pirated content?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The Ministry of Information and Broadcasting (MIB) on July 4, 2026, demanded Telegram take proactive action in detecting and taking down pirated content.

all_candidates.topic: Should Aadhaar email updates always be free for citizens?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The UIDAI made Aadhaar email updates through its mobile app free until December 31, 2026, starting July 1, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Should government block apps for public safety concerns?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The Centre ordered the blocking of battery management apps on July 3, 2026, after some users could remotely shut down e-rickshaw batteries.

all_candidates.topic: Will AI-ready citizen services truly benefit everyone?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Reports on July 10, 2026, indicate India is advancing towards more integrated and AI-ready citizen services, with improved digital self-service.

all_candidates.topic: Is locking ITC claims to GSTR-2B beneficial for businesses?
all_candidates.news_anchor: On July 9, 2026, it was announced that manual Input Tax Credit (ITC) adjustments in GSTR-3B will end from the July 2026 tax period in Ahmedabad.

all_candidates.topic: Will modified UDAN scheme significantly boost regional air travel?
all_candidates.news_anchor: PM Modi on July 4, 2026, inaugurated a new terminal building at Jodhpur airport and launched the modified UDAN Scheme.

all_candidates.topic: Does the new GST post-sale discount rule help businesses?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The Maharashtra Goods and Services Tax (Amendment) Act, 2026, gazetted on July 10, 2026, permits post-supply discounts to be excluded from taxable value if a credit note is issued and ITC is reversed.

all_candidates.topic: Will BRICS transport initiatives benefit Indian citizens directly?
all_candidates.news_anchor: India hosted the 3rd BRICS Transport Ministers' Meeting in Nagpur on July 11, 2026, to discuss sustainable infrastructure and mobility cooperation.

all_candidates.topic: Is restructuring tax administration crucial for GST success?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The government on July 2, 2026, prepared plans for a major overhaul of India's tax administration, including restructuring CBEC, for smoother GST implementation.
